summary: A Russian occupier in Donetsk region posted footage of his bike being hit by a Ukrainian FPV drone. In Mykolaiv region, Russia struck an ambulance with an FPV drone, wounding the driver and a doctor, both hospitalized. Russian forces downed a Ukrainian FPV drone in an interception. ZALA Lancet operators struck multiple enemy targets with a single loitering munition despite EW interference. A drone attack on Novorossiysk Bay hit the Russian frigate "Admiral Essen," damaging its superstructure and electronic warfare systems. The Rubicon Center intercepted over 1,500 Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs using FPV drones, destroying 107 targets on March 6 and 88 on March 7, 2026. The Ukrainian Defense Minister set a monthly goal of 50,000 enemy casualties, but drone operators report fewer targets within range.
